notes: Agent self-reports task progress via an in-band hidden irrlicht-eta marker driven by a persistent instruction-file rule. For antigravity the rule lives in AGENTS.md in a customization root (the binary's own prompt says rules append to AGENTS.md in the Global/Workspace Customizations Root). The parser feeds the full PLANNER_RESPONSE assistant content to the shared tailer.ScanTaskEstimate and sets ev.TaskEstimate; the shared ForecastTaskCompletion projects task_completion_eta at the measured rate. The phase DSL asserts only the user-observable lifecycle arc (a multi-turn ready->working->ready walk to a ready finish); the estimate-content invariants (completed_rounds present + non-decreasing + reaching total_rounds; updated_at advancing; ETA present once >=1 round + burning down; fields present only while working / absent at ready) live in the scenario acceptance_criteria + recipe. PROVISIONAL on emission: (1) whether agy strips HTML comments from AGENTS.md at injection (fence the example regardless); (2) whether agy re-emits the marker each turn. Parser handling is proven by code; emission is unverified — record settles it. cost/tokens OMITTED (SQLite-only). driver=gap:wait_turn: record ports the turn-done poll first. PREREQ: place the fenced irrlicht-eta rule in AGENTS.md in a root the per-run cwd inherits.

text: Session appears in ready (first phase anchored UNPINNED to start)
First prompt (plan 5 phases, emit 0/5 then advance) drives ready -> working; the first marker is emitted and task_estimate.total_rounds=5 appears on metrics
Turn 1 completes back to ready; completed_rounds reported — task_completion_eta now projectable
Phase-2 prompt drives ready -> working; marker advances (completed_rounds non-decreasing, updated_at advances)
Turn 2 completes back to ready; ETA after this marker <= ETA after turn 1 (burns down)
Phase-3 prompt drives ready -> working; marker advances toward 3/5
Phase-4 prompt drives ready -> working; marker advances toward 4/5
Final phase-5 prompt drives ready -> working; marker reaches 5/5 (completed_rounds == total_rounds by the final working turn)
Final turn completes working -> ready; final state ready; the >=30s trailing idle captures the post-turn settle, after which the ETA chip is suppressed (present only while working)
